name: Vademon

signature_move.name: Akuma no Nage Kiss
signature_move.description: 12Blows a kiss at the opponent that causes them to panic.Blows a kiss that summons planetoids and asteroids to hurl at the opponent.

description: An Alien Digimon shaped like something that came from the far reaches of the cosmos. However, it is rumored that it was born from the seed of a plant . While hard to imagine from its overdeveloped head and octopus-like lower body, it carries terrifying offensive power. The " Abduction Kousen " which it fires from the ray gun it holds in its hand is also a threat, and its Special Move " Akuma no Nage Kiss " is a terrifying technique which makes a complete fool out of the opponent.
